# PHIL.065 ? Naturalism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western
**Subcategory:** naturalism
**Domain:** MODERN_WESTERN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Nature as all that exists; scientific method as sole reliable path; rejection of supernatural; continuity with natural sciences

## Application
Naturalistic explanations only; scientific methodology; reject supernatural causes; continuous with empirical sciences; physicalist ontology

## Key Values
- Natural explanations
- Scientific method
- Anti-supernatural
- Empirical continuity

philosophy, modern-western, naturalism
